description: Large diff that triggers truncation, but reviewed portion contains a critical issue
diff:

+++ b/core/handler.py

+import subprocess
 
 def run_command(user_input):
-    return os.popen(f'echo {user_input}').read()

mock_response.result: {"review_status":"completed","pass":false,"issues":[{"check":"Command injection via shell=True with user input","verdict":"User input passed to subprocess with shell=True allows arbitrary command execution","fix":"Use subprocess.check_output(['echo', user_input], shell=False) to avoid shell injection","severity":"critical","confidence":"high","category":"security","file":"core/handler.py","line_hint":"5"}],"summary":"Command injection vulnerability: user input in subprocess with shell=True"}
